content: cv2.CAP_MSMF (Media Foundation) backend causes 80+ second initialization delay with USB cameras like Logitech C910/C920, versus 1.5-2.5 seconds with CAP_DSHOW. The lag is at initialization only — steady-state frame latency data is not documented. The root cause of C920 MJPEG lag (40-50ms per frame) is intrinsic to the MJPEG encode/decode pipeline in the camera hardware, not to DirectShow buffering. MSMF does not bypass MJPEG decode; it uses a different MF pipeline but still decodes MJPEG. Verdict: CAP_MSMF is NOT a viable alternative for C920-class cameras — the initialization cost alone is a showstopper. Known OpenCV issues #17687 and #27917. Keep CAP_DSHOW.
